'''wapugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabaya|kabaya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabaya|kabaya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wapugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpigith|wæpigith]] || [[word:wæpigij|wæpigij]] || [[word:wæpigish|wæpigish]] || [[word:wæpigi|wæpigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapupuguth|wapupuguth]] || [[word:wapupuguj|wapupuguj]] || [[word:wapupugush|wapupugush]] || [[word:wapupugu|wapupugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapuguth|wapuguth]] || [[word:wapuguj|wapuguj]] || [[word:wapugush|wapugush]] || [[word:wapugu|wapugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapufguth|wapufguth]] || [[word:wapufguj|wapufguj]] || [[word:wapufgush|wapufgush]] || [[word:wapufguf|wapufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapuguthu|wapuguthu]] || [[word:wapuguju|wapuguju]] || [[word:wapugushu|wapugushu]] || [[word:wapuguku|wapuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapuguth|wapuguth]] || [[word:wapuguj|wapuguj]] || [[word:wapugush|wapugush]] || [[word:wapugu|wapugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapuguthul|wapuguthul]] || [[word:wapugujul|wapugujul]] || [[word:wapugushul|wapugushul]] || [[word:wapugukul|wapugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapuguthuthu|wapuguthuthu]] || [[word:wapugujuju|wapugujuju]] || [[word:wapugushushu|wapugushushu]] || [[word:wapuguku|wapuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapuguthun|wapuguthun]] || [[word:wapugujun|wapugujun]] || [[word:wapugushun|wapugushun]] || [[word:wapugukun|wapugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapuguthuoro|wapuguthuoro]] || [[word:wapugujuoro|wapugujuoro]] || [[word:wapugushuoro|wapugushuoro]] || [[word:wapugukuoro|wapugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
